title: Saucy Roasted Chicken with Peppers
description: A flavorful and aromatic Middle Eastern-inspired dish made with roasted chicken, peppers, and spices.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt, black pepper, and Saudian ground spice mix.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
Add the sliced onions and minced garlic to the pot and cook until the onions are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced peppers to the pot and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the roasted pepper paste and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the chicken for 25-30 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
